sessionDone implies

assert_SummaryCorrect.condition:
sessionDone implies
        and summaryStatus = "fail"
        and stuckOn       = "artifacts"

Assertion failed: SummaryCorrect — sessionDone =>
        /\ summaryStatus = "fail"
        /\ stuckOn       = "artifacts"

assert_NoneRun.message: Assertion failed: NoneRun — sessionDone => reviewCallCount = MaxRetries
